queries.question: List the sitcom and dramas with 5 seasons.
queries.sql:
SELECT TelevisionShows.title 
FROM Genres JOIN TelevisionShows ON Genres.name = TelevisionShows.genre JOIN Seasons ON TelevisionShows.id = Seasons.show_id
WHERE (Genres.name = "Sitcom" OR Genres.name = "Drama") AND Seasons.number_of_seasons = 5
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genre .
  ?televisionshows a :Tv_Show .
  ?televisionshows p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?seasons a :Seasons .
  ?seasons p:hasTelevisionShows ?televisionshows .
  ?televisionshows p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w .
  ?genres p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?seasons p:number_of_seasons ?number_of_seasons_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?name_w) = "Sitcom" || STR(?name_w2) = "Drama")) && (STR(?number_of_seasons_w) = "5" || STR(?number_of_seasons_w) = "5.0")))
}

} }
